data.title: Federal Reserve Governor Milan Advocates for Rate Cut to Neutral Level This Year
data.description: Federal Reserve Governor Milan has expressed the view that the Federal Reserve should reduce interest rates to a neutral level within this year. According to Jin10, Milan's comments highlight a growing sentiment within the central bank to adjust monetary policy in response to current economic conditions. The call for a rate cut comes amid ongoing discussions about the appropriate stance of monetary policy to support economic growth while managing inflationary pressures. Milan's statement reflects a broader debate among policymakers about the timing and extent of interest rate adjustments needed to maintain economic stability.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Melania Trump Introduces Humanoid Robot at White House Event
data.description: U.S. First Lady Melania Trump showcased a humanoid robot during a White House event on Wednesday, the 25th. According to Ming Pao, the robot, capable of walking and speaking, was presented as a special guest at the gathering. The event highlighted advancements in robotics and artificial intelligence, demonstrating the growing integration of technology in various sectors. The humanoid robot's presence underscored the potential for AI-driven innovations to play a significant role in future developments.

data.title: DOJ Admits to Using Incorrect Data in Migrant Arrest Case
data.description: The U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) has acknowledged in court that it has been using inaccurate information for several months in a legal battle concerning the Trump administration's migrant arrest strategies. Bloomberg posted on X that the DOJ attributed the mistake to the U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE), describing it as a 'regrettable error.' The admission came during a federal court hearing, where DOJ lawyers explained the reliance on flawed data in the ongoing case. The issue centers around the tactics employed by the administration in handling migrant arrests, which have been under scrutiny. The DOJ's revelation could impact the proceedings, as the court evaluates the implications of the erroneous information on the case's outcome. The acknowledgment highlights the complexities and challenges faced by federal agencies in managing data accuracy in legal matters.

data.title: Netflix Expands Livestreaming of Major Events in Asia
data.description: Netflix is intensifying its efforts to livestream major events across Asia, driven by successful broadcasts such as the World Baseball Classic and BTS's comeback show. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting how these events have attracted a significant number of younger viewers to the platform. The streaming giant aims to capitalize on this trend by expanding its offerings and engaging a broader audience in the region. Netflix's strategy reflects a growing interest in live content, which is becoming increasingly popular among younger demographics. As the company continues to explore new opportunities in Asia, it seeks to leverage the popularity of live events to enhance its market presence and subscriber base.

data.title: Sony Unveils New 4K TV Amid Potential Stake Sale to TCL
data.description: Sony has introduced a new midrange 4K television along with several home theater audio products, maintaining its regular business operations. Bloomberg posted on X that this announcement comes as Sony approaches a significant deal to sell a majority stake in its home entertainment division to TCL. The move is seen as part of Sony's strategy to streamline its operations and focus on core areas. The new products are expected to enhance Sony's offerings in the competitive home entertainment market, despite the impending changes in ownership. Sony's decision to continue product launches highlights its commitment to innovation and consumer engagement.

data.title: Solana Foundation Aims to Position Network as Core of Emerging 'Agentic Internet'
data.description:
The Solana Foundation has announced its intention to position the Solana network as the core infrastructure for the emerging 'agentic internet,' where economic activities are initiated and executed by AI systems rather than humans. According to Odaily, Vibhu Norby, Chief Product Officer of the Solana Foundation, highlighted at the Digital Asset Summit in New York that AI is not just a vertical industry but a platform transformation impacting various sectors, including cryptocurrency.

Norby emphasized that Solana's strategic focus is on payment infrastructure, with the network having processed approximately 15 million on-chain payments initiated by agents, primarily for machine-to-machine commercial transactions. The programmatic nature of crypto payments is a key attraction for agents, and stablecoins are expected to become the default method for paying any computational resources.

He believes this will fundamentally reshape internet business models, enabling micropayments and pay-as-you-go systems that traditional payment channels cannot support. The Solana Foundation underscores its high-performance design as advantageous in this new paradigm, stating that agents are precise machines, and Solana is often a preferred choice for crypto payments.

Additionally, advancements in AI technology have lowered development barriers, with Solana developers actively building tools for AI systems, including machine-readable 'skill' files and AI-first development platforms. Norby anticipates that future interactions with cryptocurrency will predominantly occur through agents, with 95% to 99% of transactions initiated by large language models.

data.title: Netanyahu's Call for Iranian Protests Rejected by Trump Due to High Risks
data.description:
Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu's recent proposal to encourage Iranian citizens to protest against their government was met with caution from U.S. President Donald Trump, according to Axios, citing two American officials and an Israeli source. According to Jin10, Trump expressed concerns during a phone call with Netanyahu, questioning the wisdom of inciting street protests that could lead to violence, asking, "Why should we call people to the streets and then watch them get shot?"

The report highlights a divergence in perspectives between the U.S. and Israel regarding the approach to Iran's regime change. While both countries align on most military objectives in the ongoing conflict, they differ on the acceptable level of chaos and bloodshed to achieve regime change. Netanyahu has prioritized creating conditions for a popular uprising as a core goal, whereas U.S. officials indicate that Trump views regime change more as a potential bonus rather than a primary objective.

data.title: U.S. Officials Assess Economic Impact of Potential Oil Price Surge
data.description: Senior officials in the Trump administration are evaluating the potential economic consequences of a significant increase in oil prices, according to sources. Bloomberg posted on X, indicating that this analysis is part of a broader effort to understand the possible repercussions of extreme scenarios related to the ongoing conflict with Iran. The examination reflects concerns about how such a spike could affect the U.S. economy, highlighting the administration's proactive approach to potential global economic disruptions.

data.title: Rising Energy Costs Drive Global Interest in Clean Technology
data.description: As energy prices continue to rise globally, there is a growing interest in clean technology solutions such as electric vehicles (EVs), heat pumps, and solar panels. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting how these technologies are gaining traction as consumers and businesses seek more sustainable and cost-effective energy alternatives. The shift towards clean tech is being driven by the need to reduce reliance on traditional energy sources and mitigate the impact of fluctuating energy costs. This trend is expected to accelerate as more countries invest in renewable energy infrastructure and policies that support the adoption of clean technologies. The increasing demand for EVs, in particular, is seen as a significant step towards reducing carbon emissions and promoting environmental sustainability. Similarly, the adoption of heat pumps and solar panels is contributing to energy efficiency and reducing the carbon footprint of households and businesses. As the world grapples with energy challenges, the focus on clean technology is likely to play a crucial role in shaping the future of energy consumption and sustainability.

data.title: TACEO Launches Privacy Solution Merces II on Plasma Testnet
data.description: Privacy computing company TACEO has introduced its new privacy solution, Merces II. According to Foresight News, this solution is deployed on the Plasma testnet and is built on TACEO Network's OMap service. It aims to create a private account system for stablecoins, ensuring that users' balances, transfer records, and transaction counterparts remain concealed after funds are deposited and transactions are made. The solution can be integrated directly with existing EVM chains without requiring protocol-level modifications.

data.title: Binance Completes Integration of United Stables on Tron and Ethereum Networks
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform has successfully integrated United Stables (U) on both the Tron (TRC20) and Ethereum (ERC20) networks. This integration allows users to deposit and withdraw United Stables tokens seamlessly across these networks. The integration marks a significant step in enhancing the accessibility and functionality of United Stables within the Binance ecosystem.

Deposits and withdrawals for United Stables are now open, providing users with more flexibility in managing their digital assets. Binance emphasizes the importance of checking the assigned token deposit addresses for accuracy when conducting transactions. The integration aims to streamline operations and improve user experience by offering more options for token management across different blockchain networks.

Binance's announcement highlights the technical details of the integration, noting that users can access the token's smart contract addresses on both the Tron and Ethereum networks. This development is part of Binance's ongoing efforts to expand its offerings and provide users with diverse opportunities for engaging with digital currencies. As Binance continues to innovate and integrate new technologies, users can expect further enhancements to the platform's capabilities in the future.

data.title: Gap to Expand in China with 50 New Stores by 2026
data.description: Gap Inc. is set to open 50 new stores in mainland China by 2026, following its first break-even quarter in the region. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the clothing retailer's strategy to enhance growth over the next three years. This expansion plan comes as Gap's local operator aims to capitalize on the improving market conditions and consumer demand in China. The move is part of a broader effort to strengthen the brand's presence in the region and drive long-term profitability.

data.title: South Korea's Central Bank to Hire Experts for Digital Asset Analysis
data.description:
South Korea's central bank has announced plans to hire 10 new employees, with some positions requiring at least five years of experience in the cryptocurrency industry. According to ChainCatcher, these new hires will begin as early as July this year, taking on roles as digital asset market analysts to study the impact of cryptocurrencies, stablecoins, and tokenized assets on financial stability.

This recruitment drive coincides with the central bank's revival of its CBDC initiative, known as the Han River project. The project was previously halted last year due to user feedback on its inconvenience. The new phase of the project will focus on government and corporate applications, with the aim of distributing 25% of government subsidies via digital won by 2030. A pilot payment system is planned to launch in the first half of 2026.

The head of the Bank of Korea's digital currency planning team stated that stablecoins and CBDCs are complementary rather than competitive. This initiative aligns with upcoming legislation that will lift the long-standing ban on the issuance of cryptocurrencies and stablecoins within South Korea.

data.title: Whale Closes ETH Long Positions with Modest Profit
data.description:
On March 26, a significant Ethereum (ETH) holder closed all long positions, according to BlockBeats. The positions were closed at an average price of $2,159, resulting in a modest profit of approximately $15,000, which likely covered the order fees. The total profit for the entire cycle reached $120,000.

The long positions were initially opened on March 20 at an average price of $2,140, with an initial position size of around $8.67 million. The holder continued to roll over and add to the positions, increasing the average price to above $2,150, with the peak position size reaching $8.67 million.

data.title: Solana's Core Team Introduces Constellation Protocol to Enhance Blockchain Speed
data.description:
Solana's core development team, Anza, has launched the Constellation protocol, significantly reducing Solana's block cycle to 50 milliseconds. According to PANews, this advancement positions Solana as the fastest blockchain in terms of protocol-level economic rhythm.

The Constellation protocol replaces the single leader model with a multi-concurrent proposer system. This change eliminates exclusive control over transaction inclusion and ordering, enforcing fairness at the protocol level without relying on trusted third parties or client modifications. The economic model for validators remains largely unchanged.

data.title: Binance to Delist UTK from Margin Trading
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform will delist UTK as a borrowable asset from both Cross Margin and Isolated Margin pairs on 2026-03-30 at 06:00 (UTC). This decision affects the UTK/USDT trading pairs in both margin categories. Effective immediately, users will no longer be able to transfer UTK via manual transfers or Auto-Transfer Mode into their Margin Accounts. Users with outstanding liabilities in UTK may only transfer up to the amount of their liabilities, minus any available collateral.

On 2026-03-27 at 06:00 (UTC), Binance Margin will suspend borrowings for the UTK cross margin and isolated margin pairs. By 2026-03-30 at 06:00 (UTC), Binance will close all user positions, conduct automatic settlements, and cancel pending orders for the isolated margin pairs, which will then be removed. If users hold both collateral and liabilities in UTK on cross margin, the collateral will be used to repay the liabilities. Depending on the Collateral Margin Level (CML), remaining tokens may be transferred to Spot Accounts or sold.

For users holding UTK as liabilities, if the CML is below 2, pending orders will be canceled, and other collateral tokens will be sold to repay the liabilities. Users are advised to close positions and transfer assets to Spot Accounts before the delisting to avoid potential losses. Portfolio Margin users should transfer UTK out of Margin Accounts and monitor the Unified Maintenance Margin Ratio (uniMMR) to prevent liquidation. Any remaining UTK in Portfolio Margin Accounts after 2026-03-30 at 06:00 (UTC) will be liquidated and converted to USDT or other stablecoins. Binance emphasizes that it will not be responsible for any losses incurred during this process.

data.title: Whale Withdraws Significant Ethereum Amount from Centralized Exchange
data.description:
On March 26, a major cryptocurrency whale withdrew 11,999 ETH from a centralized exchange, marking a significant move after a month of inactivity. According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, the whale has staked the withdrawn Ethereum.

Currently, the whale holds a total of 22,618 ETH, with a floating profit of $1.2 million. This activity highlights the ongoing strategies employed by large holders in the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: CFTC Chairman Highlights Importance of Crypto Futures in U.S. Policy
data.description: The Chairman of the U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC), Michael Selig, emphasized the significance of reintroducing 'real' cryptocurrency perpetual futures to the United States as a vital element of the agency's innovation policy agenda. According to PANews, this move is seen as a crucial step in aligning the U.S. with global advancements in the cryptocurrency sector. Selig's remarks underscore the CFTC's commitment to fostering innovation while ensuring regulatory compliance in the rapidly evolving digital asset landscape.

data.title: South Korea to Stabilize Bond Market with Government Bond Buyback
data.description: South Korea has announced measures to stabilize its bond market, according to Jin10. The country's Ministry of Finance stated that it will repurchase government bonds worth 5 trillion Korean won. Following the announcement, South Korean government bond futures experienced a slight increase.

data.title: TD Securities: Oil Price Fluctuations Unlikely to Prompt Aggressive Fed Action
data.description: TD Securities analysts have indicated that the recent volatility in oil prices is unlikely to lead the Federal Reserve to adopt aggressive policy measures. According to Jin10, while the market has begun to factor in the risk of interest rate hikes due to high inflation expectations, TD Securities suggests that the Fed is more likely to adopt a 'wait-and-see' approach. The leadership at the Federal Reserve remains inclined towards implementing rate cuts in late 2026. The bank further noted that as long as long-term inflation expectations remain stable and second-round effects are controlled, the Fed will overlook the impact of this energy shock.
